History Vandalism as a Weapon of the Left-Liberal Child Abuse of Three Generations

# History Vandalism as a Weapon of the Left-Liberal Child Abuse of Three Generations

### A walk down memory lane to uncover the manner in which history was used as a tool to create three generations of deracinated Hindus

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

**IF LITTLE KNOWLEDGE IS DANGEROUS**, too much knowledge is fatal. But thanks to the prevailing Regime of Gizmos and the Dictatorship of Apps which has turned everyone into experts on everything, nobody knows nothing of, let alone substance, even basic things like *how* and *where* our food grows. Small wonder that 99 per cent of the [folks](https://www.dharmadispatch.in/commentary/low-intensity-jihad-against-the-citizenship-amendment-act-and-the-eerie-similarities-with-khilafat-moplah-and-direct-action-day) [rioting against](https://www.dharmadispatch.in/commentary/the-anti-caa-riots-are-an-ongoing-intifada-formulated-by-the-post-independence-recruits-of-future-partitions-of-india) [the C…](https://www.dharmadispatch.in/commentary/the-anti-caa-riots-are-a-preplanned-revolt-against-the-narendra-modi-government)
